creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: amdmi3
Date: Wed Jan  8 21:39:02 2014
New Revision: 339180
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/339180

Log:
  - Fix duplicate directory in plist
  
  PR:		185050
  Submitted by:	amdmi3
  Approved by:	maintainer timeout

Modified:
  head/textproc/docbook-440/Makefile
  head/textproc/docbook-450/Makefile

Modified: head/textproc/docbook-440/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/docbook-440/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 21:31:59 2014	(r339179)
+++ head/textproc/docbook-440/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 21:39:02 2014	(r339180)
@@ -57,7 +57,6 @@ pre-install:
 		done;\
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrm ${DOCSDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}" ) >> ${PLIST}
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrm ${DOCSDIR:S!^${PREFIX}/!!:S!${PORTVERSION}!!}" >> ${PLIST}
-	${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrmtry ${DOCSDIR:S!^${PREFIX}/!!:S!${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION}!!}" >> ${PLIST}
 .endif
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@exec ${XMLCATMGR} ${REGIST_CAT_FLAGS_SGML}" >> ${PLIST}
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@unexec ${XMLCATMGR} ${UNREGIST_CAT_FLAGS_SGML}" >> ${PLIST}

Modified: head/textproc/docbook-450/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/docbook-450/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 21:31:59 2014	(r339179)
+++ head/textproc/docbook-450/Makefile	Wed Jan  8 21:39:02 2014	(r339180)
@@ -57,7 +57,6 @@ pre-install:
 		done;\
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrm ${DOCSDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}" ) >> ${PLIST}
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrm ${DOCSDIR:S!^${PREFIX}/!!:S!${PORTVERSION}!!}" >> ${PLIST}
-	${ECHO_CMD} "@dirrmtry ${DOCSDIR:S!^${PREFIX}/!!:S!${PORTNAME}${PORTVERSION}!!}" >> ${PLIST}
 .endif
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@exec ${XMLCATMGR} ${REGIST_CAT_FLAGS_SGML}" >> ${PLIST}
 	${ECHO_CMD} "@unexec ${XMLCATMGR} ${UNREGIST_CAT_FLAGS_SGML}" >> ${PLIST}
